summary: Full coverage for the new 'Recent activity by you' strip on WallBoard. Backend pytest suite (13 cases) and Playwright FE check (EN/AR/DE + empty-state) all pass against the public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 2881 lines — recommend extracting the activity feed (log_activity helper + GET /api/activity/recent + the per-domain log_activity call sites) into a dedicated /app/backend/activity_module.py to follow the same modular pattern used for auth_module.py and to stay under the 700-line guideline.
auth_module.build_family_router duplicates the log_activity helper (its own _log_activity). Single shared helper would prevent drift between event/kids-money and family-members logs.
GET /api/activity/recent caps limit at 20 but does not reject limit=0 or negative — verified that limit=0 returns empty (acceptable), but consider explicit Query(ge=1, le=20) validation.

Activity payloads embed raw amounts/titles. If a kid's transaction description ever contains PII, it would surface to admins via scope=family. Consider truncating/sanitizing payload.description on log.
test_credentials: Fresh families registered per run via /api/auth/register with qa-act-<ts>@example.com / Pass1234!. Admin Alice PIN=1234, child Suleiman PIN=3333.
seed_data_creation: Each test class spins up a fresh family (TEST_ACT_Family / TFE) with TEST_-prefixed members and events; no cleanup since families are unique per run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_activity_recent.py (pytest, 13 cases, ~6s runtime). It exercises: empty list for fresh admin, event.created+deleted, member.added (kid Suleiman), kids_money income+payment, goal.created + goal.completed (true-from-false-only — explicitly verifies that toggling is_complete=false does NOT add a new completed entry), scope=self isolation (child does not see admin events), scope=family for admin (asserts {'event.created','event.deleted','member.added','kids_money.income.added','kids_money.payment.added','goal.created','goal.completed'} subset), 403 for child scope=family, default limit=3, limit cap at 20, cross-family isolation (A's admin never sees TEST_B_SecretEvent / TEST_KidB and vice versa). FE script /app/test_reports/fe_activity_test.py uses real Playwright (chromium) to seed activity via REST then loads /wall-board after stuffing localStorage, validates 'recent-activity-strip' renders inside 'wall-member-strip', items have data-testid 'activity-item-<kind>', text matches EN/AR/DE localized templates with relative-time suffix, and empty-state (no seeded activity) renders neither strip nor loading skeleton. Important: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is required as env. Cloudflare blocks default urllib User-Agent — set Mozilla UA. Screenshot uses .jpg (PNG does not accept quality param in Playwright Python).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects found. Every spec bullet verified.
